landing.introduction: With a range of built-in and extensible Modes, Kiwi Code lets you plan, architect, code, debug and boost your productivity like never before.

providerSignup.heading: Choose your provider
providerSignup.chooseProvider: Kiwi Code needs an LLM provider to work. Choose one to get started, you can add more later.

telemetry.helpImproveMessage: Kiwi Code is fully self-hosted and does not collect any telemetry, usage data, or analytics. Your code and prompts are sent only to the AI providers you configure. No data ever transits Kiwi Code servers.
